flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nashville State Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (10.3% → 8.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nashville State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Nashville State Community College fell 30% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.8k → $9.6k).
